title: Incorrect query result for index_subquery type IN subquery
poc: SELECT * FROM z_newcreate_tmp WHERE state NOT IN(SELECT abbreviation FROM z_newcreate_tmp1);
key_bug_features: IN subquery with index_subquery access method produces incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `z_test_table` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `value` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`));
CREATE TABLE `z_abbreviation_table` (`abbreviation` VARCHAR(2) DEFAULT NULL, UNIQUE KEY (`abbreviation`));
SELECT * FROM z_test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT abbreviation FROM z_abbreviation_table WHERE abbreviation IS NOT NULL);
